(403/CWW) EDMUNDO VASQUEZ FOR MINORS; N/A PET AT 11:34A; RESP IN PRO PER; FCS ANDREW WALLACE. MR. WALLACE STATES HE INFORMED PET OF THIS HEARING BY PHONE AND LETTER. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING ORDER. RESP MAY HAVE PHONE CONTACT WITH BOTH CHILDREN ONCE PER WEEK; RESP TO PHONE CHILDREN WHEN PET NOT AT HOME. MR. WALLACE SHALL PROVIDED RESP WITH PET'S PHONE NUMBER. FAMILY THERAPY BETWEEN BRENDA AND RESP THROUGH INSTITUTO FAMILIA OR OTHER APPROPRIATE SETTING. MR. VASQUEZ AND MR. WALLACE TO ASSIST IN COORDINATING; FAMILY THERAPY BETWEEN PET AND CHIARA TO CONTINUE AND POSSIBLY WITH BRENDA; COMMUNICATION AMONG ALL THERAPISTS POSSIBLY COORDINATED BY MS. ZIMMERMAN AT INSTITUTO FAMILIA. PET SHALL SIGN RELEASES FOR ALL THERAPIST SO MR. VASQUEZ AND MR. WALLACE MAY SPEAK WITH THEM. MR. VASQUEZ TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
